apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Your Rokt CAPI API Key. Contact your Rokt representative to obtain this value.

apiSecret.label: API Secret
apiSecret.description: Your Rokt CAPI API Secret. Contact your Rokt representative to obtain this value.

send.title: Send
send.description: Send analytics data to Rokt CAPI.

eventDetails.label: Event Details
eventDetails.description: Details about the event to be sent to Rokt CAPI.

conversiontype.label: Conversion Type
conversiontype.description: Type of conversion, This should usually be mapped to the Segment track() event name. e.g., "Order Completed".

confirmationref.label: Confirmation Reference
confirmationref.description: Unique ID for the conversion, ideally an order ID.

amount.label: Amount
amount.description: Monetary amount associated with the conversion.

source_message_id.label: Source Message ID
source_message_id.description: Unique identifier for the source message.

timestamp_unixtime_ms.label: Event Timestamp
timestamp_unixtime_ms.description: Event timestamp in Unix time milliseconds.

eventProperties.label: Additional Custom Attributes
eventProperties.description: Additional custom attributes for the event.

hashingConfiguration.label: Hashing Configuration
hashingConfiguration.description: Specify if email and certain user attributes should be hashed before sending.

hashEmail.label: Hash Email
hashEmail.description: If enabled, Segment will ensure that the email address is hashed using SHA256 before sending.

hashFirstName.label: Hash First Name
hashFirstName.description: If enabled, Segment will ensure that the first name is hashed using SHA256 before sending.

hashLastName.label: Hash Last Name
hashLastName.description: If enabled, Segment will ensure that the last name is hashed using SHA256 before sending.

hashMobile.label: Hash Mobile Number
hashMobile.description: If enabled, Segment will ensure that the mobile number is hashed using SHA256 before sending.

hashBillingZipcode.label: Hash Billing Zip Code
hashBillingZipcode.description: If enabled, Segment will ensure that the billing zip code is hashed using SHA256 before sending.

ios_advertising_id.@liquid: {% if context.device.advertisingId and context.device.type == 'ios' %}{{ context.device.advertisingId }}{% endif %}

android_advertising_id.@liquid: {% if context.device.advertisingId and context.device.type == 'android' %}{{ context.device.advertisingId }}{% endif %}

ios_idfv.@liquid: {% if context.device.id and context.device.type == 'ios' %}{{ context.device.id }}{% endif %}

android_uuid.@liquid: {% if context.device.id and context.device.type == 'android' %}{{ context.device.id }}{% endif %}

ios_advertising_id.label: iOS Advertising ID
ios_advertising_id.description: Advertising ID from an iOS mobile device.

android_advertising_id.label: Android Advertising ID
android_advertising_id.description: Advertising ID from an Android mobile device.

ios_idfv.label: iOS ID for Vendor
ios_idfv.description: ID for Vendor from an iOS mobile device.

android_uuid.label: Android UUID
android_uuid.description: UUID from an Android mobile device.

user_identities.label: User Identities
user_identities.description: Unique user identifiers used to identify the user. At least one identifier is required, or the advertising ID in device info.

email.label: Email
email.description: User email address. This can be in plain text or hashed using SHA256. If you send plain text and would like Segment to hash the email address for you, enable the "Hash Email" field.

dob.label: Date of Birth
dob.description: User date of birth in ISO8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

audienceDetails.label: Audience Details
audienceDetails.description: Details of the audience to add the user to or remove the user from. If connecting to a Segment Engage Audience, leave this field empty.

customAudienceName.label: Audience Name
customAudienceName.description: Name of the audience for audience membership updates. If connecting to a Segment Engage Audience leave the field empty.

customAudienceMembership.label: Audience Membership
customAudienceMembership.description: Boolean indicating whether the user is a member of the audience. If connecting to a Segment Engage Audience leave this field empty.

engageAudienceName.label: Audience Name
engageAudienceName.description: Name of the audience for audience membership updates. If connecting to a Segment Engage Audience, leave the detault mapping as is.

traitsOrProps.label: Traits or properties object
traitsOrProps.description: Object that contains audience name and value.

computationAction.label: Segment Computation Action
computationAction.description: Hidden field used to verify that the payload is generated by an Audience.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

rtid.label: RTID
rtid.description: ROKT RTID value from the page URL. The 'Rokt Browser Plugin' Action automatically captures this value from the querystring in the browser, then passes it to this field.

default.@liquid: {% assign rokt_rtid = integrations['Rokt Conversions API'].rtid %}{% if rokt_rtid %}{{ rokt_rtid }}{% else %}{% assign parts = context.page.search | split: 'rtid=' %}{% if parts[1] %}{{ parts[1] | split: '&' | first }}{% endif %}{% endif %}

roktPlugin.title: Rokt Browser Plugin
roktPlugin.description: Enriches all Segment payloads with Rokt rtid Querystring value
roktPlugin.defaultSubscription: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "page" or type = "group" or type = "alias"

ios_advertising_id.@liquid: {% if context.device.advertisingId and context.device.type == 'ios' %}{{ context.device.advertisingId }}{% endif %}

android_advertising_id.@liquid: {% if context.device.advertisingId and context.device.type == 'android' %}{{ context.device.advertisingId }}{% endif %}

ios_idfv.@liquid: {% if context.device.id and context.device.type == 'ios' %}{{ context.device.id }}{% endif %}

android_uuid.@liquid: {% if context.device.id and context.device.type == 'android' %}{{ context.device.id }}{% endif %}

rtid.@liquid: {% assign rokt_rtid = integrations['Rokt Conversions API'].rtid %}{% if rokt_rtid %}{{ rokt_rtid }}{% else %}{% assign parts = context.page.search | split: 'rtid=' %}{% if parts[1] %}{{ parts[1] | split: '&' | first }}{% endif %}{% endif %}

ios_advertising_id.@liquid: {% if context.device.advertisingId and context.device.type == 'ios' %}{{ context.device.advertisingId }}{% endif %}

android_advertising_id.@liquid: {% if context.device.advertisingId and context.device.type == 'android' %}{{ context.device.advertisingId }}{% endif %}

ios_idfv.@liquid: {% if context.device.id and context.device.type == 'ios' %}{{ context.device.id }}{% endif %}

android_uuid.@liquid: {% if context.device.id and context.device.type == 'android' %}{{ context.device.id }}{% endif %}

presets.name: Rokt Browser Plugin
presets.subscribe: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "page" or type = "group" or type = "alias"
